title: Delicate Dark Vietnamese Tofu Noodles
description: A fresh and light Vietnamese dish featuring dark brown soft sugar and tandoor spices, perfect for a plant-based meal. This dish is easy to make and packed with flavor.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together the dark brown soft sugar, tandoor spice mix, and soy sauce.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the tofu to the skillet and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add the sugar and spice mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Stir in the lime juice and cook for 1 minute.
To serve, place the cooked noodles in a bowl and top with the tofu and sauce mixture.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
